intro.title: Reveal Your Role
intro.description: AI models are evolving quickly, creating a high demand for specialized knowledge. Take a few simple steps to find out where your professional experience fits into this new frontier.

expertiseQuiz.question: What is your primary area of domain expertise?
expertiseQuiz.subtitle: Select the option that best matches your professional background or training.

results.title: Your Match is Ready
